title: Conversations We Never Finished
content: Every relationship leaves behind unfinished conversations. Some end because life interrupts them. Others remain incomplete because fear convinces us to stay silent. Years after our last meeting, I still remembered questions I never asked and stories I never shared. Strangely, those missing conversations became more memorable than the countless ones we actually had. They represented possibilities rather than memories. One afternoon, I found an old notebook filled with plans we once imagined together. Reading those pages no longer filled me with regret. Instead, they reminded me that every relationship changes us, even through words left unsaid. Perhaps we never truly finish every conversation. Perhaps we simply carry parts of them forward into the people we become.
